response.original_title: THE ROMULAN WAR II Teaser Meet the Yorktown
response.overview: The Yorktown-class battleship is a massive, heavily armed Starfleet vessel featured in the Star Trek fan production The Romulan War Part II. Designed to turn the tide of humanity's conflict with the Romulan Star Empire, the ship represents a major tactical upgrade for Earth's forces.
response.title: THE ROMULAN WAR II Teaser Meet the Yorktown
